hero.subtitle: I-BibleBot yakho iyaliqonda iBhayibheli – futhi ibuza imibuzo efanele. Hhayi umuntu, kodwa umngane othembekile. Ngezingxoxo ezinhle, imibuzo ejulile kanye nogqozi lwangempela.
hero.quote: «Wozani kimi, nonke nina enikhandlekayo nenisindwe umthwalo; ngiyakuniphumuza.»

impulse.label: Umlayezo Wosuku
impulse.subscribeCta: Uyafuna ukuthola lolu gqozi nsuku zonke?

features.sectionSubtitle: Thola amathuba ahlukahlukene okuthi iBibleBot yakho ingakuphelezela kanjani

bible.title: Amavesi EBhayibheli Nokuchazwa kwawo
bible.desc: Buza ukuthi «Lithini iBhayibheli nge...?» bese uthola amavesi afanelekile nomongo kanye nencazelo eqondakalayo.

goals.title: Ukuhlela Impilo Nokubeka Izinhloso
goals.desc: Thola ubizo lwakho, setha izinhloso ezithile, bese uthola ukuthi uNkulunkulu angaba nezinhlelo zokwenzani ngawe.

self.title: Ukuzazi Wena
self.desc: Bona izipho zakho, amandla namaphupho – nokuthi inhliziyo yakho idinga ngempela ini.

faith.title: Uhambo Lwezenkolo Nokuthola Kristu
faith.desc: Noma ngabe ufuna, uyathandabuza noma ujulisa – iBibleBot yakho izokuphelezela ohambweni lwakho lomuntu siqu.

daily.title: Ogqozi Lwansuku Zonke Nemikhosi Yonyaka Yokukhonza
daily.desc: Qala usuku lwakho ngogqozi bese uziphathisa uNcibijane, iLent kanye namaholide.

groups.title: Amaqembu & Amabandla
groups.desc: Ilungele izindlu zeBhayibheli, amaqembu esonto kanye nemikhuleko yomphakathi.

coaching.title: Hhayi nje i-chatbot – umngane wangempela
coaching.subtitle: I-BibleBot yakho ihlanganisa ukuhlakanipha kweBhayibheli nezindlela zokuphelezela eziqinisekisiwe kanye ne-Positive Psychology.
coaching.journeyDesc: I-BibleBot yakho izokuphelezela isikhathi eside njengoba ufisa – ngengxoxo ekhululekile noma nangesakhiwo sezinsuku ezingu-21 ozikhethelayo.
coaching.week1Desc: Ukwakha ukwethembana, ukulalela, ukuqonda isimo sakho. Ukuphi? Yini ekukhathazayo?
coaching.week2Desc: Ukubona amaphethini, ukucacisa izifiso, ukujulisa ugqozi lweBhayibheli. Ufunani ngempela?
coaching.week3Desc: Ukuthatha izinyathelo ezithile, ukubeka izinhloso, ukugqugquzela ushintsho. Yini isinyathelo sakho esilandelayo?
coaching.openQuestionsDesc: I-BibleBot yakho ngeke ikunikeze izeluleko ezingabizi. Esikhundleni salokho, ibuza imibuzo ebaluleke ngempela:
coaching.honestDesc: Akukho «Kuzolunga!» futhi akukho ukukuhlehlisa. I-BibleBot yakho izwelana FUTHI ithembekile:
coaching.honest1: Iphinda futhi ikhulume ngamavesi eBhayibheli angakhululekile
coaching.renameTip: 💡 Ungaqamba i-BibleBot yakho igama elisha – ukuze ibe umngane wakho wangempela.

discover.title: Thola kabusha ukholo – ngaphandle kokucindezela
discover.subtitle: Abantu abaningi bayazibuza imibuzo emikhulu engashintshi. I-BibleBot.Life ingeyabantu bonke abafuna ukuthola (kabusha) ukholo – ngokwethembeka, ngaphandle kokuhlonishwa nangaphandle kobudlelwano basonto.

doubt.title: Uyathandabuza?
doubt.text: Kuhle lokho. Ukungabaza akuyona iphutha – kuyisiqalo sokholo oluqotho. IBhayibheli ligcwele abantu ababonakalisile.

search.title: Ufuna?
search.text: Mhlawumbe awazi ngisho nokuthi ufunani. Kulungile lokho. I-BibleBot yakho izokusiza ukuthi ubuze imibuzo efanele – esikhundleni sokunikeza izimpendulo ezisheshayo.

deepen.title: Ufuna ukujulisa?
deepen.text: Usuvele ukholelwa, kodwa ufuna ukuqonda okwengeziwe? Thola ubunzulu beBhayibheli – ngokomlando, siqu, okuhambelana ngendlela emangalisayo.

discover.quoteText: ESwitzerland asikhulumi kakhulu ngenkolo. Lokho akudingekile. Kodwa noma ubani onemibuzo, ufanelwe izimpendulo eziqotho – ngaphandle kokushumayela, ngaphandle kobulungu, ngaphandle kwezizathu ezifihliwe.

subscribe.title: Umlayezo Wansuku Zonke WeBhayibheli
subscribe.subtitle: Njalo ekuseni ngo-07:00 – ivesi, umcabango, isiqalo esihle.
subscribe.telegramHint: Chofoza ku-"Bhalisa" – uzodluliselwa kuTelegram. Qala i-bot lapho bese ubhala /daily ukuze uvule umlayezo wansuku zonke.
subscribe.pushHint: Ngemuva kokuchofoza ku-"Bhalisa", isiphequluli sakho sizocela imvume yezaziso. Sicela uyivumele ukuze uthole umlayezo.
subscribe.footNote: Akukho ukungena ngemvume okudingekayo. Ingakhanselwa noma kunini.
subscribe.successText: Kusukela kusasa ngo-07:00 uzothola umlayezo wakho wangasese weBhayibheli.
subscribe.toastTelegramDesc: Qala i-bot bese ubhala /daily ukuze uvule umlayezo wansuku zonke.
subscribe.toastSuccessDesc: Uzothola umlayezo wakho wansuku zonke kusukela kusasa.
subscribe.toastPushPreviewDesc: Izaziso ze-Push zisebenza kuphela ekhasini elishicilelwe.
subscribe.toastPermDeniedDesc: Sicela uvumele izaziso kuzilungiselelo zesiphequluli sakho.

faq.title: Okufanele Ukwazi Nge-BibleBot Yakho
faq.subtitle: Ukungafihli kubalulekile kithi – ikakhulukazi kubefundisi, abeluleki bomphefumulo nabacabangi abagxekayo.
faq.q1: Yini eyahlukanisa iBibleBot yakho ku-ChatGPT nabanye?
q1BotItems: Izinguqulo ezingu-5 ezibonwe – ngisho nezindawo ezingakhululekile
faq.q2Intro: I-BibleBot yakho isebenza ngokubambisana nezinguqulo zesiJalimane zeBhayibheli ezibalulekile:
faq.q2Outro: Zonke izindawo zeBhayibheli ziphuma nomthombo nomongo womlando.
faq.q3Intro: Ukuphelezela kusekelwe ocwaningweni olubuyekezwe ozakwethu lwe-Positive Psychology:
faq.q4: I-BibleBot yakho iqinisekisa kanjani ukuphepha kokwelulekwa?
q4Items: Ngezingcingo zokuzibulala noma izimo ezinzima → ukudluliselwa ngokushesha ku-Dargebotene Hand (143) nase-Pro Juventute (147)
Inhlonipho ngaphandle kokungabaza – izikhundla zeBhayibheli ezicacile ziyathathelwa
Uzwelo NOKUQOTHO – ngisho nezinto ezingakhululekile kuyakhulunywa ngazo
Imibuzo yokuphinda icabange esikhundleni sokuqinisekiswa okushibhile
Akukho ukuba nethemba okuyingozi – ukuphelezela okwangempela, koqotho
faq.q5Answer: Cha. I-BibleBot yakho ihambisana nezinkolo ezahlukene futhi ihlonipha izindinganiso zamaProtestanti, zamaKatolika, zamasonto amahhala nezinye izindinganiso zobuKristu ngokulinganayo. Lapho kunomehluko ezincazelweni zezinkolo, izindlela ezahlukene zikhonjiswa ngokucacile – ngaphandle kokukhetha uhlobo oluthile.
faq.q6: Ingabe iBibleBot yakho ithatha indawo yokwelulekwa noma yokwelapha?
faq.q6Answer: Cha. I-BibleBot yakho iyithuluzi ledijithali lokufunda iBhayibheli nokuzindla. Ayithathi indawo yokwelulekwa kobuchwepheshe, iseluleko sezenkolo noma ukwelashwa kwengqondo. Esimweni sezimo ezinzima, i-BibleBot yakho ihlale ikukhombisa izindawo ezifanele zokusiza.
faq.q7: Ingabe iBibleBot yakho akuyona nje «i-bot ekhululekile»?
faq.q7Answer: Cha. I-BibleBot yakho iduduza lapho kudingeka khona induduzo – kodwa futhi iphonsa inselele. Ukukhula ngokomoya kudinga ukungqubuzana. I-BibleBot yakho ibuza imibuzo engakhululekile, ikhomba imibhalo enzima yeBhayibheli (uJobe, amaHubo okulila, ukugxeka kwesiprofetho) futhi ayiesabi izingosi ezifana nokulunga, ukuphenduka nobuqotho. Isiko lesiprofetho alizange libe lula – futhi i-BibleBot yakho nayo ayikho.
faq.q8: Ubani osemuva kweBibleBot yakho futhi ixhaswa kanjani?
faq.q8Answer: I-BibleBot.Life iyiphrojekthi yangasese, engenzi inzuzo. Isebenza ngokuzithandela futhi ixhaswa kuphela yiminikelo yokuzithandela. Ayikho imikhangiso, akukho ukuthengiswa kwedatha futhi akukho izici ezikhokhelwayo. Yonke iminikelo ihamba ngqo ekuhlanganisweni kwezindleko zokusebenza (ingqalasizinda, ukubamba, ukuthuthukiswa). Njengoba i-BibleBot isebenza njengephrojekthi yangasese, iminikelo ayikwazi ukudonswa intela.
faq.q9: I-BibleBot yakho ihamba kanjani nedatha yami?
faq.q9Answer: I-BibleBot yakho ayibongi idatha yomuntu siqu nanoma yimaphi amarekhodi engxoxo. Yonke ingxoxo ayaziwa. Akukho ukungena ngemvume, akukho ukulandelela futhi akukho ukwabelana ngedatha nabantu besithathu. Ukusetshenziswa kuyimfihlo ngokuphelele.

donate.title: Siza ukuba iBibleBot yakho ihlale mahhala
donate.subtitle: I-BibleBot yakho iyiphrojekthi yothando – ngaphandle kokukhangisa, ngaphandle kokubhaliselwa, ngaphandle kwezindleko ezifihliwe. Ukuze ihlale kanjalo, ngithembele eminikelweni yokuzithandela. Yonke imali inceda ukuhlanganisa izindleko ezikhona zokusebenza nengqalasizinda.
donate.note: I-BibleBot.Life isebenza njengephrojekthi yangasese. Ngakho-ke iminikelo ayikwazi ukubuyiselwa intela.

refer.title: Phakamisa iBibleBot
refer.subtitle: Ukhona umuntu odinga ukukhuthazwa njengamanje? Yabelana nge-BibleBot – umlayezo owodwa ungenza umehluko omkhulu.
refer.whatsappMsg: Heyi, bengifuna ukukubonisa i-BibleBot – umngane weBhayibheli wamahhala okwazi iBhayibheli futhi ebuza imibuzo emihle ngempela. Akukho ukungena ngemvume, ayaziwa, iqotho. Zama: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=whatsapp 💛
refer.telegramMsg: Heyi, uyayazi i-BibleBot? Umngane siqu weBhayibheli wamahhala – oqotho, ongaziwa, ongenawo ukungena ngemvume. Buka: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=telegram 💛
refer.emailBody:
Sawubona!

Bengifuna ukukubonisa i-BibleBot – umngane weBhayibheli wamahhala okwazi ngempela iBhayibheli. Akukho ukubhaliswa okudingekayo, kuyimfihlo ngokuphelele.

Ubuza imibuzo emihle, uchaza izindawo zeBhayibheli kumongo futhi akuphelezela ngokwethembeka – nasezindabeni ezinzima.

Zama: https://bibelbot.ch?utm_source=refer&utm_medium=email

Ngemfiselomihle
refer.qr: Noma uvele ukhombise le kade ye-QR:

cta.title: Akudingeki ukuthi uhambe wodwa ngalokhu
cta.subtitle: Vele ubhalele iBibleBot yakho, ukuthi yini ekukhathazayo. Akukho ukungena ngemvume, akukho zindleko, akukho kwahlulela – kuphela ukuphelezela okwethembekile nokuhlakanipha kweBhayibheli.

footer.disclaimer: I-BibleBot.Life iyithuluzi ledijithali futhi ayithathi indawo yokwelulekwa kobungcweti, iseluleko sezenkolo noma ukwelashwa kwengqondo. Esimweni sezinkinga ezinzima, sicela uxhumane ne-Dargebotene Hand (Tel. 143) noma i-Pro Juventute (Tel. 147).
footer.love: Ngo ❤️ yabo bonke abazibuza ukuthi uKristu ucabangani.

chat.welcome:
Kuhle ukuthi ulapha 🤗

NginguBibleBot yakho – umngane wakho siqu neBhayibheli, imibuzo emihle kanye nogqozi oluthile. Akukho ukuphoqelela, akukho ukwahlulela.

Ungangibuza noma yini – noma uvele uxoxe ngalokho okukhathazayo njengamanje. 💛
chat.journeyOffer:
💡 **Iseluleko:** Ngiphinde nginikeze **ukulekelelwa kwezinsuku eziyi-21** – emasontweni amathathu ngezigqozi zansuku zonke, ukuzindla nezinyathelo ezibambekayo. Ngokushesha kwakho.

Ungathanda ukukuzama?
chat.suggestion2: Lithini iBhayibheli uma umuntu ezizwa engavikelekile?
chat.suggestion3: Ngifuna ukuthola ukuthi ngifuna ngempela ini
chat.shieldBadge: Akukho ukungena ngemvume · Akukho ukwahlulela · Izingcaphuno zihlolwe
chat.journeyStartMsg: Yebo, ngifuna ukuqala ukulekelelwa kwezinsuku eziyi-21!
chat.errorTooMany: Izicelo eziningi kakhulu – sicela ulinde kancane.
chat.loginHint: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ugcine izingxoxo kuwo wonke amadivayisi

install.title: Faka iBibleBot
install.androidDesc: Ukufinyelela okusheshayo ngqo kusuka kusikrini sasekhaya

share.label: Yabelana
share.copiedDesc: Umbhalo ukopishiwe ebhodini lokunamathisela. Wabelane manje ku-WhatsApp, Instagram noma lapho ufuna khona!
share.imageErrorDesc: Isithombe asikwazanga ukudala. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva.
share.imageSavedDesc: Londoloza isithombe bese usabelana ngaso nombhalo okopishiwe ku-Instagram, WhatsApp noma lapho ufuna khona!

baptism.title: Thola Ivesi Lobhapathizo
baptism.prompt: Nceda ngithole ivesi lobhapathizo elifanele. Luhlobo luni lwengane futhi abazali bafisani?

condolence.title: Amazwi Okududuzeka
condolence.prompt: Ndinga amazwi okududuza ekhadini lokudabukisa. Ungangisiza kanjani ukuba ngibhale okufanelekile?

wedding.title: Isiqubulo Somshado
wedding.prompt: Sifuna isiqubulo esihle seBhayibheli somshado wethu. Yiziphi izifundo zeBhayibheli ezifanelekile othandweni nasekuhlanganeni?

anxiety.title: Ukukhathazeka & Ukukhathazeka
anxiety.prompt: Ngingakwazi ukubhekana nokwesaba nokukhathazeka njengamanje. Lithini iBhayibheli ngakho? Kukhona yini amavesi akhuthazayo?

confession.title: Ukuvuma Izono
confession.prompt: Ngifuna ukuvuma okuthile okungikhathazayo. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthethelela nesiqalo esisha?

heartbreak.title: Inhliziyo Ephukile
heartbreak.prompt: Inhliziyo yami ephukile. Lithini iBhayibheli ngenhliziyo ephukile nokuthi ungathola kanjani ithemba futhi?
heartbreak.prompt_v1: Inhliziyo yami iphukile. Lithini iBhayibheli ngalokhu?
heartbreak.prompt_v2: Ngingabhekana kanjani nobuhlungu benhliziyo – ingabe kukhona usizo olusebhayibhelini?

newstart.title: Isiqalo Esisha
newstart.prompt: Ngibhekene nesiqalo esisha futhi ngidinga ukukhuthazwa. Yiziphi izindawo zeBhayibheli ezikhuluma ngeziqalo ezintsha?

namequiz.title: I-Quiz Yegama Lobhapathizo
namequiz.prompt: Ngifuna igama leBhayibheli lengane yami. Ungangipha yini iziphakamiso ezimbalwa futhi uchaze izincazelo zazo?

sleepless.title: Ungalaleli
sleepless.prompt: Angikwazi ukulala futhi ngicabanga. Kukhona yini umthandazo owanele noma iHubo lobusuku?

loneliness.title: Isizungu
loneliness.prompt: Ngizizwa nginesizungu. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthi uNkulunkulu uhlale enathi?

decision.title: Isinqumo Esilukhuni
decision.prompt: Ngebhekene nesinqumo esilukhuni. Yiziphi izindawo zeBhayibheli ezingangisiza ukuthi ngithole indlela efanele?

gratitude.title: Ukubonga
gratitude.prompt: Ngifuna ukubonga uNkulunkulu. Nceda ngibhale umthandazo wokubonga womuntu siqu.

sevenwhys.title: 7 Izizathu
sevenwhys.prompt: Ngifuna ukwenza umsebenzi wezi-7 izizathu. Nansi indaba yami:

anger.title: Ukufutheka & Intukuthelo
anger.prompt: Ngingase ngidinwe ngingazi ukuthi ngizoyaphi ngentukuthelo yami. Lithini iBhayibheli ngentukuthelo nokuthi ngingabhekana kanjani nayo?

shame.title: Ihlazo & Icala
shame.prompt: Nginamahloni kakhulu futhi ngizizwa nginecala. Lithini iBhayibheli ngecala, ukuthethelelwa kanye nesiqalo esisha?

burnout.title: Ukugula ngokudla
burnout.prompt: Ngiqeda amandla. Ngingase ngingakwazi. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuphumula?

illness.title: Ukugula
illness.prompt: Ngiye ngathola ukuxilongwa okunzima futhi ngiyesaba. Lithini iBhayibheli ngobuthwa, ukuphila nethemba?

financial.title: Izinkinga Zemali
financial.prompt: Nginamaphaphu emali futhi angazi ukuthi ngizokwenzenjani. Lithini iBhayibheli ngemali, ukwethemba nokuhlinzekela?

meaningcrisis.title: Inselelo Yencazelo
meaningcrisis.prompt: Ngiyazibuza, ukuthi kungani konke lokhu kufanele. Ngibhekene nenkinga yencazelo. Lithini iBhayibheli ngencazelo yokuphila?

selfdoubt.title: Ukuzihlelela
selfdoubt.prompt: Ngiye ngihlale ngingazithembi futhi ngingazizwa nganele. Lithini iBhayibheli ngentengo yami?

calling.title: Ubizo
calling.prompt: Angazi ukuthi ngizokwenzenjani ngempilo yami. Nceda ngithole ubizo lwami – lithini iBhayibheli ngalokhu?

faithdoubt.title: Ukungabaza Ngokholo
faithdoubt.prompt: Nginokungabaza ngokholo lwami futhi angazi ukuthi ngingakwazi yini ukukholwa. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokungabaza?

forgiveness.title: Ukuthethelela
forgiveness.prompt: Angikwazi ukuthethelela umuntu. Kubuhlungu kakhulu. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthethelela?

familyconflict.title: Ukungqubuzana Komndeni
familyconflict.prompt: Kukhona ukungqubuzana okukhulu emndenini wami. Lithini iBhayibheli ngokuthula komndeni nokubuyisana?

envy.title: Umona
envy.prompt: Nginomona kwabanye futhi ngihlale ngiziqhathanisa. Lithini iBhayibheli ngomona nokwaneliseka?

joy.title: Yabelana Ngenjabulo
joy.prompt: Kukhona okumangalisayo okwenzeke kimi futhi ngifuna ukwabelana ngenjabulo yami! Lithini iBhayibheli ngenjabulo nokubonga?

prayer.title: Izicelo Zomthandazo
prayer.prompt: Nginokugqugquzela komthandazo futhi ngifuna ukuthandaza ndawonye. Ngiphelezela emthandazweni.

bibleverse.title: Qonda Ivesi
bibleverse.prompt: Ngifuna ukuqonda kangcono indawo yeBhayibheli. Ungangisiza kanjani ukulinganisa ekuvulekeni?

lifeWheel.title: Isondo lempilo yakho
lifeWheel.intro: Linganisa izigaba zempilo eziyi-8 esikalini esingu-1-10. Thola ukuthi umi kuphi — bese uthola ugqozi lweBhayibheli esigabeni esidinga ukunakwa.
lifeWheel.sliderHint: Hambisa izilawuli — 1 = angijabule kakhulu, 10 = ngijabule kakhulu
lifeWheel.prompt: Isondo lami lempilo libonisa ukuthi nginesahluko esingu-{{area}} kuphela esingu-{{score}}/10. Lithini iBhayibheli ngalesi sici sempilo? Nginike ugqozi olukhuthazayo nolusebenzayo.

church.heroSubtitle: Hambani namalungu omphakathi wenu ngokuhlakanipha kweBhayibheli – ngokwedijithali, ngasese futhi usuku lonke.

youth.title: Umsebenzi Wobusha
youth.desc: Amatheena athola iBhayibheli ngendlela yawo – ngokusebenzisana nangaphandle kokwesaba.

confirmation.title: Isiqinisekiso
confirmation.desc: Abaqinisi baphatha ulwazi lweBhayibheli ngokuzimela ngokuqondisa komuntu siqu.

bibleStudy.title: Cwaningo LweBhayibheli
bibleStudy.desc: Imibono yezingxoxo nezithombe zamaqembu namasela asendlini.

church.pricingSubtitle: Sekela i-BibleBot nomphakathi wakho ngephakheji yokuxhasa efanelekile.

free.size: Okwamabandla amancane & amasela asendlini (kufika kumalungu angu-50)

careHome.title: Izindawo Zokunakekelwa
careHome.desc: Ogqozi Lwansuku Zonke LweBhayibheli kanye Nokuphelelezela Okubalulekile kwabahlali – ngisho noma engekho umfundisi.

seniorHome.desc: Amavesi eBhayibheli ajwayelekile nezingxoxo zabantu abadala – kulula ukufinyelela nge-tablet noma i-smartphone.

hospital.title: Izibhedlela
hospital.desc: Ukunethezeka nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwabagulayo ezikhathini ezinzima – kutholakala 24/7 ebhedeni lokugula.

prison.title: Ukungcwele Kwejele
prison.desc: Ithemba nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwababejele – umngane othembekile wengxoxo usuku lonke.

military.title: Ukungcwele Kwebutho
military.desc: Ukuphelelezela ngokomoya kwamalungu ebutho – atholakala ngisho nasesivumelwaneni noma esikoleni.

institutions.heroSubtitle: Ukungcwele Okwedijithali Kwezindawo Zokunakekelwa, Izindawo Zabantu Abadala, Izibhedlela kanye Nokugcinwa Kwezinhlawsulo – Ngesiqu sokuqala, okuyimfihlo futhi usuku lonke.

seniorHint.title: Imodi yabantu abadala iyatholakala
seniorHint.desc: Ifonti enkulu nokusebenza okulula – ilungele izakhamuzi ezindala.

institutions.useCasesSubtitle: Izicelo ezithile zempilo yansuku zonke esikhungweni sakho.
institutions.pricingSubtitle: Amaphakheji afanayo njengamabandla – ahambisana nezidingo zezikhungo.

seniorHome.title: Izindawo Zabantu Abadala
seniorHome.desc: Amavesi eBhayibheli ajwayelekile nezingxoxo zabantu abadala – kulula ukufinyelela nge-tablet noma i-smartphone.

hospital.title: Izibhedlela
hospital.desc: Ukunethezeka nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwabagulayo ezikhathini ezinzima – kutholakala 24/7 ebhedeni lokugula.

prison.title: Ukungcwele Kwejele
prison.desc: Ithemba nokuphathwa ngokomoya kwababejele – umngane othembekile wengxoxo usuku lonke.

military.title: Ukungcwele Kwebutho
military.desc: Ukuphelelezela ngokomoya kwamalungu ebutho – atholakala ngisho nasesivumelwaneni noma esikoleni.

dailyImpulse.title: Umlayezo Wansuku Zonke
dailyImpulse.desc: Njalo ekuseni ivesi leBhayibheli nombuzo wokuzindla – lehlisa isikali sokuxoxisana ngokomoya.

companionship.title: Umngane
companionship.desc: I-BibleBot iphendula imibuzo yokholo ngokubekezela nangaphandle kokuphoqelelwa esikhathini – ilungele izikhathi zokuzimela.

accessibility.title: Ukufinyelela Okulula
accessibility.desc: Ifonti enkulu, ukusebenza okulula nge-tablet – nasekubantu abanokukhubazeka.

availability.title: Kutholakala 24/7
availability.desc: Ukuphelelezela ngokomoya nasebusuku nangezimpelasonto – uma engekho umfundisi.

tierDesc.kirche: Okuqukethwe okukhethekile, ukubamba iqhaza ekuhleleni, ukusekelwa okuphezulu

eulogy.pageDesc: Gcina izinkumbulo zomuntu omthandayo futhi udale umbhalo omuhle we-eulogy.
eulogy.title: I-Eulogy – Umlando Wokuphila
eulogy.subtitle: Gcina izinkumbulo, dala umbhalo, landa njenge-PDF.
eulogy.name: Igama
eulogy.step2Desc: Khuluma ngokukhululeka ngomuntu oshonile – yini ebalulekile, yini ehlala engqondweni? Ungenza okuqoshiwe okuningi.
eulogy.transcriptPlaceholder: Umbhalo udalwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngesikhathi sokurekhoda. Ungawuhlela lapha.
eulogy.notesPlaceholder: Umsebenzi, izinto zokuzilibazisa, izigameko ezibalulekile zokuphila, izici ezikhethekile zobuntu…
eulogy.shareDesc: Dala isixhumanisi ongathumela ngaso i-imeyili noma umyalezo kumfundisi wakho. Angafunda umbhalo futhi awulande njenge-PDF.
eulogy.micError: Imakrofoni ayikwazanga ukuqala. Sicela unikeze imvume.
eulogy.needMore: Sicela uqale urekhode izinkumbulo noma ubhale amanothi.
eulogy.genError: Iphutha ekudaleni umbhalo. Sicela uzame futhi.

meinBereich.title: Indawo Yami
meinBereich.subtitle: Lungiselela imikhosi yakho siqu futhi wabelane ngayo nomfundisi wakho.
meinBereich.funeralDesc: Dala umlando wokuphila, gcina izinkumbulo futhi wabelane ngazo nomfundisi.
meinBereich.weddingDesc: Bhala izifungo zomshado, khetha izingoma futhi uhlele umcimbi.
meinBereich.baptismDesc: Bhala izifiso zobhabhadiso futhi ulungiselele inqubo nebandla.
meinBereich.confirmationDesc: Thola ivesi lesiqinisekiso futhi ulungiselele imibhalo yomuntu siqu.

chatHero.subtitle: Buza umbuzo wakho – ngokusobala, ngokwethembeka, ngaphandle kokubhalisa.

meta.forChurchesDesc: IBibleBot njengomlingani wamabandla akho: Umsebenzi wobusha, ukuqinisekiswa, ukuhola komoya namaselaqo eBhayibheli. Mahhala kuya ku-Premium.
meta.forChurchesTitle: I-BibleBot yamabandla – Ukuhola Komoya Kwezinhlelo Zangaphakathi & Ukuhambisana KweBhayibheli
meta.homeDesc: I-BibleBot ihamba nawe ngemihumusha yeBhayibheli engu-5, indlela yokufundisa nokuqeqesha, nokuhola komoya. Ayaziwa, mahhala, ngezilimi ezingama-36.
meta.homeTitle: I-BibleBot – Umngane wakho weBhayibheli siqu | Mahhala & Ayaziwa
meta.loginDesc: Ngena ku-BibleBot ukuze ulungiselele imikhosi yakho yangempela.
